subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the Wronged One unto them that have believed in God, the Lord of the worlds, that the fragrances of Revelation may draw them unto the luminous horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین لتجذبه نفحات الوحی الی افق انار
